{{Infobox concept
| name = Iron
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Iron Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|Iron refers to a significant stage of [[advancement]] within the [[Foundation]] realm, following the [[Copper]] rank. Achieving an [[Iron body]] provides a quantitative leap in power, granting practitioners superhuman capabilities that far exceed those of [[Copper]]-level individuals. This stage is characterized by a more solid and bright core, as well as the ability to produce Iron-quality [[madra]]. While practitioners still require sustenance and rest, an [[Iron body]] offers enhanced durability, making them resistant to physical injuries like pulled muscles or bleeding to death. However, the transformation process can be a violent and painful experience where the body expels impurities. There are various specialized types of Iron bodies, each offering unique advantages. The [[Steelborn body]] is renowned for providing immense physical strength, particularly at higher ranks like [[Underlord]]. The [[Bloodforged Iron body]] is designed to resist corrosive damage, though it consumes [[madra]] very rapidly. The [[Moonheart Iron body]] allows a practitioner to separate their consciousness from their physical form, ensuring that bodily trauma does not disrupt mental or spiritual control. Additionally, the [[Silverscale Iron body]] is used to bolster spiritual resistance against attacks. In terms of progression, most [[sacred artists]] in the [[Wei clan]] reach this stage in their early twenties, though exceptionally disciplined individuals can achieve it much younger. Reaching the Iron rank also enables the use of specific advanced equipment, such as flying swords powered by Iron-quality [[madra]]. While an Iron is powerful enough to combat most threats, they remain vulnerable to highly advanced or intelligent [[Remnants]].}}

== Unsouled ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iron]] strength is a level of power [[Kelsa]] needs to fight effectively.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c2">''Unsouled'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Iron]] is a stage of practitioner.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c12">''Unsouled'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">17</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|At the [[Iron stage]], one's eyes get better and they forge their body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of [[advancement]] following [[Copper]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is waiting for [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a body type or stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of [[advancement]] related to [[madra]]/body strength.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage that can be reached after walking a [[Path]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a physical attribute or state that [[Miners{{!}}miners]] possess.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|To reach [[Iron]], one must push [[madra]] out of the channels and into the flesh.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of [[advancement]] lower than [[Jade]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15">''Soulsmith'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a power stage.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Advancing to [[Iron]] completely reforges the body.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Advancing to [[Iron]] too early can cripple a [[sacred artist]]'s future.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The transformation to [[Iron]] is a possibility for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of [[advancement]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a stage of [[advancement]] for [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Iron]] is a rank or stage held by [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|An [[Iron]] child should have no more pride than a mouse.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Sandviper Kral{{!}}Kral]] was killed by a boy who is an [[Iron]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|An [[Iron]] is a stage of progression that still needs sleep and food.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Iron]] is a quality of [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The character possesses [[Iron{{!}}iron]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Irons]] are a group that stayed behind during the fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iron]] is a rank or stage held by some guards of the [[Fallen Leaf School]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Iron]] is a guard that uses spears and [[Foxfire{{!}}foxfire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11">''Bloodline'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iron]] is a level of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Heaven's Glory]] group includes a dozen [[Irons]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Iron]] is a rank or classification of person in the [[Wei clan]] context.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c15">''Bloodline'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“A boy he brought with him. Just an Iron.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“You're an Iron, not a Remnant; you still need sleep. Food.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
